heading: Prohibition against Federal mandates, direction, or control
label: 7371 Prohibition against Federal mandates, direction, or control
text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to authorize an officer or employee of the Federal Government to mandate, direct, or control a State, local educational agency, or school’s specific instructional content, academic standards and assessments, curriculum, or program of instruction, as a condition of eligibility to receive funds under this chapter.
